title: Assess
text:
# Assess

## Assess for Potential

Cut through the noise with scientifically validated assessments that identify top talent faster while creating a fairer, more engaging experience for every candidate. 

Book a Demo  Explore Pricing

Criteria Assessments score reports man smiling

### Assessments for Every Role

Reveal the real person behind every application. Our comprehensive portfolio of pre-employment tests uncovers the authentic strengths, potential, and fit across every dimension of who candidates truly are. 

#### Cognitive Aptitude

Uncover candidate potential with cognitive aptitude, one of the top predictors of job success.

**Measures:**

* Problem solving
* Attention to detail
* Learning ability
* Mechanical reasoning
* Concentration and focus 
  

View Tests

#### Personality

Gain insight into how candidates naturally work, communicate, and fit within your team.

**Measures:**

* General personality
* Workplace preferences
* Role-specific fit (e.g. sales, customer service) 
  

 
View Tests

#### Emotional Intelligence

Find candidates who have the empathy and emotional intelligence skills to succeed at work.

**Measures:**

* Emotional perception
* Emotional understanding
* Emotion management 
 
  

 
View Tests

#### Risk

Evaluate candidates’ reliability, rule-following behavior, and approach to workplace safety.

**Measures:**

* Integrity and honesty
* Rule adherence
* Risk of unsafe behavior 
  

 
View Tests

#### Skills

Measure job-specific competencies that reflect a candidate’s current skills and capabilities.

**Measures:**

* Job readiness
* Computer skills
* Microsoft Office proficiency
* English language proficiency

 
View Tests

### Try Our Assessments for Free

Test drive our user-friendly assessment platform

Start a Free Trial

## See the Whole Person, Not Just a Score

Every candidate is more than a number. They're a complex blend of abilities, drive, and untapped potential that a resume struggles to showcase. That's why we built a suite of assessments that work together to reveal the complete picture. Because the best hires aren't one-dimensional, and your assessments shouldn't be either. 

iceberg graphic

## Where Candidate Experience Meets Innovation

We've combined adaptive testing, intelligent design, and AI-powered insights to create assessments that candidates don't have to dread, but engage with.

Mobile-Friendly

Mobile-Friendly

Attract more candidates and increase accessibility by reaching candidates right on their mobile devices.

Adaptive Technology

Adaptive Technology

Tailor the difficulty level to the candidate, creating a faster, more predictive testing experience.

Game-Based Assessments

Game-Based Assessments

Take the candidate experience to the next level with short, fun, and engaging mini-games.

###### OUR SCIENCE

## Validated Science. Real Results.

Bad hires will cost you. That's why our assessments are built on rigorous I/O psychology and validated by leading experts to predict actual job performance, not just check a box. They're time-tested to be fair, objective, and proven to work across thousands of organizations worldwide. Because gut feelings don't scale, but science does. 

60 Million+ Tests Administered

15+ Years of Accumulated Data

3 Billion+ Item Responses

Learn More

Rigorous science that drives performance

### Assessments in a wide range of languages

We've delivered assessments to candidates across 60 countries.  
Learn more about the many languages we support. 
 

View Test Languages

We service organizations big and small across every industry and job type. Explore what tests we recommend for your organization.
